title: Why do t_vgen and t_flag_make_cmake fail instead of skip on missing install?
body: I just made a clean install with ./configure --enable-longtests and ran the tests, and got failures at the end related to missing an install of cmake and the perl module Bit::Vector. However, I see all the tests requiring vcddiff and systemC were skipped instead of erroring out. Why not skip running these tests instead of erroring?
